title: Invalid delete request for Gmail label
symptom: When attempting to delete the 'STARRED' label in Gmail, an error message 'Invalid delete request' is returned.
root_cause: The error occurs because the label ID provided does not correspond to a valid label that can be deleted. In this case, 'STARRED' is a system label that cannot be deleted, leading to the invalid request error.
fix_steps: Identify the correct label ID for the label you want to delete
Use the 'remove' operation instead of 'delete' if applicable
agent_instruction: Ensure you are using the correct label ID and operation type for your Gmail node.
